title: Youtube Poop Where's the King
description:
Dear viewers, 
One of the best YouTube Poop makers on the internet, WalrusGuy, has closed  his account.
In order to ensure his awesome videos live on, I  have taken the opportunity to re-upload them. I did not make any of these.
Thank you.

Update: According to more breaking info, it turns out he was actually hacked.  Either way, I shall upload these videos during his hiatus for all to keep enjoying.

Update: He's back, but now he's quit YouTube Poop, so I may as well keep these posted.

This video was uploaded: February 04, 2009.  Exact description below.

I'm not sure who to feel sorrier for: the King or Link.
